mapper.update: UPDATE fin_payable SET paid_amount = #{paidAmount}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM fin_payable WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT * FROM fin_payable
is_deleted = false
AND supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount - paid_amount), 0) FROM fin_payable WHERE is_deleted = false AND status != 'paid'
